test_result.unit_test: PASS — 5개 테이블 존재 확인: community_posts, community_votes, community_comments, community_bookmarks, bot_reports
test_result.integration_test: PASS — Supabase Management API 적용 완료, 누락 컬럼(user_id, views_count, comments_count, likes_count) 추가, RLS 정책 17개 생성
test_result.edge_cases: PASS — mcw_bots.id가 text 타입이므로 bot_id 컬럼은 논리적 참조로 설계; community_votes UNIQUE(post_id, user_id), community_bookmarks UNIQUE(post_id, user_id) 중복 방지
test_result.manual_test: PENDING — 실제 API 엔드포인트 연동 후 PO 테스트 필요

build_verification.deploy: PASS — Supabase Management API POST /v1/projects/{ref}/database/query 적용 완료
build_verification.runtime: PASS — 5개 테이블 생성 확인, 인덱스 12개, RLS 정책 17개 적용

integration_verification.dependency_propagation: PASS — S3BA7(community-post.js, community-comment.js)에서 참조하는 모든 컬럼 coverage: community_posts(id, title, content, madang, category, user_id, bot_id, upvotes, downvotes, likes_count, views_count, comments_count, created_at, updated_at), community_comments(id, post_id, parent_id, user_id, bot_id, content, upvotes, downvotes, created_at, updated_at)
integration_verification.cross_task_connection: PASS — community_comments.post_id → community_posts.id CASCADE, bot_reports.post_id/comment_id → 각 테이블 SET NULL, community_votes.post_id → community_posts CASCADE
integration_verification.data_flow: PASS — INSERT community_posts → community_comments(comments_count 업데이트) → community_votes(upvotes/downvotes 집계) 흐름 완결
